function.name: vcd_protocol_decode
function.description:
Decode bus protocol transactions (AXI4 / APB / UART / SPI). Returns transactions, protocol violations, and performance statistics.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

function.name: vcd_fsm_trace
function.description:
Extract state machine transitions from a state signal. Detects stuck states and provides per-state duration statistics.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

state.description: Signal pattern that must resolve to exactly one signal

stuck_threshold.description: Duration above which a state is reported stuck (default 100us)

function.name: vcd_causality
function.description:
Find potential causes for a signal change at a specific time. Ranks candidates by temporal proximity (40%) and historical correlation (60%); automatically filters clock-like signals.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.

effect.description: Effect signal pattern (must resolve to exactly one signal)

at.description: Time when the effect was observed

function.name: vcd_anomaly_detect
function.description:
Detect common waveform anomalies: stuck signals, glitches, metastability, bus contention. Severity-classified output suitable for triage.

Returns the standardized VCD Analyzer envelope: {status, skill, execution_time_ms, input, result, metadata, suggestions}. On error, the envelope has status="error" and error={code, message, details}.
